decoder_heading: Privacy Policy

heading_content_part: This privacy policy applies to (i) our website at www.smsrobot.com (the "Site"); and (ii) any of our games, mobile applications, products or services (whether accessible via a web application, third party platform, social networking service or otherwise) (together our "Services").

decoder_heading: Privacy Policy

heading_content_part: By using any of our Services, you confirm that you have read, understood and agree to this privacy policy in its entirety. If you do not agree to this policy, please do not use any of the Services. If you have any queries, please email us at support@smsrobot.com.
